default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Plan long-term strategy and immediate next steps for the Tools Directory page and individual tool pages.](https://fathom.video/share/FsMakp5wk17Ptz71TzVwSGHwdfs-1cN8?tab=summary&timestamp=30.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Restructure directory into two main categories: AI Video Translation Tools and AI Video Creation Tools](https://fathom.video/share/FsMakp5wk17Ptz71TzVwSGHwdfs-1cN8?tab=summary&timestamp=60.0)
  - [Prioritize launching with existing content, then optimize user experience in phases](https://fathom.video/share/FsMakp5wk17Ptz71TzVwSGHwdfs-1cN8?tab=summary&timestamp=198.0)
  - [Update placeholder content and images on individual tool pages before launch](https://fathom.video/share/FsMakp5wk17Ptz71TzVwSGHwdfs-1cN8?tab=summary&timestamp=466.0)
  - [Use existing page templates (e.g., customer stories) to expedite launch of new tool pages](https://fathom.video/share/FsMakp5wk17Ptz71TzVwSGHwdfs-1cN8?tab=summary&timestamp=915.0)

## Topics

### Directory Page Structure and Scalability

  - [Current layout limits scalability for both individual cards and categories](https://fathom.video/share/FsMakp5wk17Ptz71TzVwSGHwdfs-1cN8?tab=summary&timestamp=219.0)
  - [Long-term plan: Optimize filtering component for better user experience as content grows](https://fathom.video/share/FsMakp5wk17Ptz71TzVwSGHwdfs-1cN8?tab=summary&timestamp=293.0)
  - [Short-term solution: Keep current layout, add "Load More" functionality](https://fathom.video/share/FsMakp5wk17Ptz71TzVwSGHwdfs-1cN8?tab=summary&timestamp=233.0)
  - [Update page title to "AI Tools" for better search visibility](https://fathom.video/share/FsMakp5wk17Ptz71TzVwSGHwdfs-1cN8?tab=summary&timestamp=681.0)

### Content Categories and Organization

  - [Consolidate into two main categories: AI Video Translation Tools and AI Video Creation Tools](https://fathom.video/share/FsMakp5wk17Ptz71TzVwSGHwdfs-1cN8?tab=summary&timestamp=557.0)
  - [Drop AI Avatars category for now due to limited content](https://fathom.video/share/FsMakp5wk17Ptz71TzVwSGHwdfs-1cN8?tab=summary&timestamp=564.0)
  - [Ensure at least four tools per category before launching](https://fathom.video/share/FsMakp5wk17Ptz71TzVwSGHwdfs-1cN8?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)
  - [Map existing content to appropriate categories (e.g., language pairs under translation tools)](https://fathom.video/share/FsMakp5wk17Ptz71TzVwSGHwdfs-1cN8?tab=summary&timestamp=557.0)

### Individual Tool Pages

  - [Use existing page templates (e.g., customer stories) to expedite launch](https://fathom.video/share/FsMakp5wk17Ptz71TzVwSGHwdfs-1cN8?tab=summary&timestamp=915.0)
  - [Make step-by-step component optional in CMS for flexibility](https://fathom.video/share/FsMakp5wk17Ptz71TzVwSGHwdfs-1cN8?tab=summary&timestamp=1329.0)
  - [Update placeholder content and images before launch](https://fathom.video/share/FsMakp5wk17Ptz71TzVwSGHwdfs-1cN8?tab=summary&timestamp=466.0)
  - [Customize "Related Tools" section for each category](https://fathom.video/share/FsMakp5wk17Ptz71TzVwSGHwdfs-1cN8?tab=summary&timestamp=557.0)

### SEO and Discoverability

  - [Balance between broad "AI Tools" and specific "AI Video Tools" for better search performance](https://fathom.video/share/FsMakp5wk17Ptz71TzVwSGHwdfs-1cN8?tab=summary&timestamp=647.0)
  - [Use category pages (e.g., "AI Video Translation Tools") to target more specific search intents](https://fathom.video/share/FsMakp5wk17Ptz71TzVwSGHwdfs-1cN8?tab=summary&timestamp=722.0)
  - [Focus on middle-of-funnel content to improve search rankings](https://fathom.video/share/FsMakp5wk17Ptz71TzVwSGHwdfs-1cN8?tab=summary&timestamp=706.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Bruna: Update directory page with new categories and send for review](https://fathom.video/share/FsMakp5wk17Ptz71TzVwSGHwdfs-1cN8?tab=summary&timestamp=1679.0)
  - [Bisera: Prepare content for AI Video Creation category](https://fathom.video/share/FsMakp5wk17Ptz71TzVwSGHwdfs-1cN8?tab=summary&timestamp=1700.0)
  - [Caitlin: Update placeholder content on individual tool pages](https://fathom.video/share/FsMakp5wk17Ptz71TzVwSGHwdfs-1cN8?tab=summary&timestamp=1720.0)
  - [Hunter: Create distinguishing graphics/icons for different tool categories](https://fathom.video/share/FsMakp5wk17Ptz71TzVwSGHwdfs-1cN8?tab=summary&timestamp=1545.0)
  - [Nav: Map final list of tools to appropriate categories](https://fathom.video/share/FsMakp5wk17Ptz71TzVwSGHwdfs-1cN8?tab=summary&timestamp=1422.0)
  - [Team: Continue discussions and updates via Slack](https://fathom.video/share/FsMakp5wk17Ptz71TzVwSGHwdfs-1cN8?tab=summary&timestamp=1708.0)

action_items.description: Update directory page - AI tools title, 2 categories (AI video translation, AI video creation), link individual pages when ready
Check CMS - make "steps" component optional for tool detail pages
Write body copy for AI video creation category
Create distinct iconography/imagery for AI video creation category cards
Replace placeholder imgs on language pages w/ shared use case imgs
